NN_SPLMT_FMLY_CMNT_CSP_UNAVBL_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Supplemental HRSN Family and Community Support Community Service Provider Unable to 
Help 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated supplemental health related social need (HRSN) family and 
community support community service provider (CSP) unavailable or unable to help. 

LONG NAME: NN_SPLMT_FMLY_CMNT_CSP_UNAVBL_SW
